response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems (notably Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of HTTP requests/second), with strong craftsmanship habits (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and proficiency in required languages (JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C/C++). However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, or statistical analysis — which are the core focus of this Principal Growth/Experimentation role. Title progression is mostly Senior/Staff rather than Principal-level systemic ownership across multiple teams.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background with high-scale low-latency experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, pairing) and demonstrated mentorship via workshops and courses
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP) aligns with AI-first growth systems
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout-risk experience
Limited evidence of telemetry/metrics platform work or statistical/data-science partnership at scale
Career trajectory (Senior/Staff) lacks the cross-team Principal-level systemic platform ownership the role requires

key_factors.factor: Strong fundamentals and high-scale distributed systems background
No evidence of Principal/IC6-level cross-team platform leadership
